title: 乙名史記者の悦楽取材

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
choice_data_list: It's all thanks to her hard work.

text_block_list.name: Reporter Otonashi
text_block_list.text: Now I'm certain. The next extra-large, full-color special feature has to be about you two!
Sounds like we can expect a great response from the next Twinkle Monthly!

I go to praise <chrname> for her
victory.
